preamble: Diphthongization of the nasalized mid-back vowel õ into the rising diphthong ue. This shift is found in Portuguese historical stages and Spanish dialectal variation.

examples.note: Historical Portuguese and dialectal Spanish developments from Latin long O or open O.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Languages: A Historical Introduction. Cambridge University Press.
